title: Hyprland 0.55 is here and you don't want to miss it!
excerpt: After quite a long while, Hyprland 0.55 is upon us! This is an enormous update by each measurable metric - commits, contributors, features and changes.
content_html:
After quite a long while, Hyprland 0.55 is upon us! This is an enormous update by each measurable metric - commits, contributors, features and changes.

Highlights

With 0.55, there are tons of changes, let’s bring the highlights first.

Lua configs

As we’ve announced a while back, the Hyprland config is now done in Lua. This does not mean your hyprlang config is now broken - it will still work, for a few releases.

The entire wiki has been updated to reflect new Lua configs and you are encouraged to migrate over to Lua.

User-defined layouts

With Lua, we’ve also added a Layout API for you to define your own layouts directly in the config. Those layouts can be set globally, per-workspace, per-monitor, etc. and behave just like regular layouts, except fully controlled by you.

Various scrolling improvements

Scrolling now supports fullscreen windows as part of the tape by default:

As well as a native trackpad gesture via scroll_move in lua.

ICC Profiles

You can now load an ICC profile per-output in your config via icc = "..path.." in your config for color accuracy.

Renderer and CM improvements

Hyprland will now use FP16 precision and improved CM pipelines by default for Color Managed displays. This helps with color accuracy, screensharing, and various color-related things.

Breaking changes

A few config option updates:

  • dwindle:pseudotile has been removed as it wasn’t doing anything
  • decoration:shadow:ignore_window has been removed (defaults to enabled)
  • render:cm_fs_passthrough has been removed, should be automatic with render:cm_auto_hdr
  • misc:vfr moved to debug: as it’s a debug variable that should not be changed in prod environments

New stuff and fixes

As usual, tons of goodies:

  • A bunch of scrolling goodies: expel, consume, consume_or_expel, wrapping options, and so on.
  • A new auto_consuming flag for binds
  • Device tags
  • confine_pointer window rule
  • move_into_or_create_group for the move dispatcher
  • rotatesplit layoutmsg for dwindle
  • A new live pinch cursor zoom trackpad gesture
  • A new glow decoration for windows
  • And much more…

And the usual fixes, way too many to list…

The raw release

As always, if you prefer reading more, check the release on Github.

Cheers, vax

content_html_zh:
时隔许久，Hyprland 0.55 终于来了！ 这是每个可衡量指标（提交、贡献者、功能和更改）的巨大更新。

亮点

0.55 有很多变化，让我们先来看看亮点。

Lua配置

正如我们不久前宣布的那样，Hyprland 配置现在是在 Lua 中完成的。 这并不意味着您的 hyprlang 配置现在已损坏 - 对于一些版本，它仍然可以工作。

整个 wiki 已更新以反映新的 Lua 配置，我们鼓励您迁移到 Lua。

用户定义的布局

通过 Lua，我们还添加了一个布局 API，供您直接在配置中定义自己的布局。 这些布局可以全局设置、每个工作空间、每个监视器等，并且其行为就像常规布局一样，只不过完全由您控制。

各种滚动改进

默认情况下，滚动现在支持全屏窗口作为磁带的一部分：

以及通过lua中的scroll_move实现原生触控板手势。

国际商会简介

您现在可以通过 icc = "..path.." 在配置中加载每个输出的 ICC 配置文件 在您的配置中以确保颜色准确性。

渲染器和 CM 改进

Hyprland 现在将为色彩管理显示器默认使用 FP16 精度和改进的 CM 管道。 这有助于颜色准确性、屏幕共享以及各种与颜色相关的事情。

重大变化

一些配置选项更新：

  • dwindle:pseudotile 已被删除，因为它没有做任何事情
  • 装饰：阴影：ignore_window已被删除（默认启用）
  • render:cm_fs_passthrough 已被删除，应该是自动的 render:cm_auto_hdr
  • 杂项：vfr 移至调试：因为它是一个调试变量，不应在生产环境中更改

新内容和修复

像往常一样，大量好东西：

  • 一堆滚动的好东西：expel、consume、consume_or_expel、包装选项等等。
  • 用于绑定的新自动消耗标志
  • 设备标签
  • limit_pointer 窗口规则
  • move_into_or_create_group 用于移动调度程序
  • 缩小的旋转分割布局消息
  • 新的实时捏合光标缩放触控板手势
  • 窗户的新发光装饰
  • 还有更多……

还有常见的修复，太多了，无法列出……

原始版本

与往常一样，如果您喜欢阅读更多内容，请查看 Github 上的版本。

干杯，瓦克斯
